inputs.title: Refresh workflows canvas styling
inputs.description: Make the workflow editor look better on mobile.

context.failureMode: Implementation ships desktop-only flex fill after a max-width media block, causing empty panes on narrow viewports.

rubric.criterion: Reviewer or harness flags horizontal overflow outside intentional scrollports.
Settings embed shows both list and detail at <=1080px after fix.

provenance.source: Failure pattern from CSS cascade regressions in catalog layouts.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized failure mode; no single source task id archived.
